context:
When a user creates a new child company within a media company, should it be a full company creation flow (name, slug, branding) or a lightweight version (just name, auto-generate slug)?
  • Lightweight (Recommended) — Just name + auto-slug. They can fill in branding/details later in company settings.
  • Full creation flow — Name, slug, website, branding — same as the current signup company creation.

Where should the 'Create Media Company' UI live for superadmins?
  • Superadmin Companies page (Recommended) — Add a 'Create Media Company' button to the existing /app/admin/companies page
  • Dedicated admin page — New /app/admin/media-companies page with full CRUD
  • Both — Superadmin companies page for quick creation, plus a dedicated management page

For the company profile association — should a company admin be able to CHANGE which media company their company belongs to, or only view it?
  • View only (Recommended) — Company admins can see their media company but can't change it. Only media company admins or superadmins can reassign.
  • Editable by company admin — Company admins can request to join a different media company or detach.
message:
1.Offer all of the fields but make only the name required

2. In the companies page. Refactor where needed to have th experience make sesne. Also add ability to assign a company (from the list) to a media company with a searchable dropdown

3. CView only
